title: anacamptis longicornu
intro: Anacamptis longicornu, also known as the Green-winged Orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid found in the Iberian Peninsula and North Africa. The medicinal properties of this plant have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Anacamptis longicornu include alleviating coughs, colds, and sore throats, as well as providing relief from menstrual cramps and other gynecological issues. Anacamptis longicornu is typically prepared as a tincture or infusion, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
